Title: Extends the effectiveness of certain provisions relating to tickets to places of entertainment
Summary: Extends the effectiveness of certain provisions relating to tickets to places of entertainment.
LawCode: Amd §4, Chap 704 of 1991; amd §11, Chap 151 of 2010
ActClause: AN ACT to amend chapter 704 of the laws of 1991 amending the arts and cultural affairs law and chapter 912 of the laws of 1920 relating to regulation of boxing and wrestling matches relating to tickets to places of entertainment, and chapter 151 of the laws of 2010 amending the arts and cultural affairs law relating to resale of tickets to places of entertainment, in relation to extending the effectiveness thereof
